description_short: A soft, comfortable duvet cover made from 100% cotton with a percale weave for breathability.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Wash in delicate cycle with cold water and mild detergent. No bleach/softeners. Air-dry.

proprietary_tech.name: Corner Loops
proprietary_tech.description: 4 corner loops for tying duvet in place.

faq_specs.question: What is the thread count of the duvet cover?
faq_specs.answer: The duvet cover has a thread count of 200.

notes_observed: Same 6 colors as percale fitted bedsheet — matching set. Note: schema reported dims in cm (228.6/152.4) — corrected to mm here.
